title: Mr. Belvedere Rings the Bell
writer: Ranald MacDougall, Gwen Davenport, Robert E. McEnroe
actors: Clifton Webb, Joanne Dru, Hugh Marlowe
plot: An urbane, sharp-tongued expert on how to stay young interrupts a lecturing tour to prove his theory at a dilapidated old people's home. To the despair of his agent and the alarm of the priest running it, he infiltrates the home b...
